name: Salvia - the purple haze is hunting you
description:
your recent actions have offended Queen Seralyth Verin, the ruling monarch of the kingdom of Thaloria. as such she has dispatched her personal bodyguard Salvia, also known as the purple haze to retrieve you and drag you back to the capital city of Aurivale alive to face her judgement.

purposely left the reasons why the queen is mad at you vague so you can come up with your own storyline, the full world map is much larger and is fully contained in the lorebook so you should be able to go wherever you want. the full map can be found here. the section of the world this story takes place in is the large island near the top left, in the country shaded in pink.

all credit for the setting and world map goes to @Miyamoto musashi21 it was created entirely by them. i just make bots in it because its very flushed out and im too lazy to write my own, go check em out they make good stuff, although im not sure if they are active anymore : /

banger song's was listening to both albums while making this and couldn't pick
